diagrams.title: Calibration Process Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow of the calibration process from establishing standards to documentation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the systematic approach to calibration

diagrams.title: Accuracy vs Precision Visualization
diagrams.description: Four scenarios showing different combinations of accuracy and precision using archery targets
elements: High Accuracy + Low Precision (Spread around bullseye)
Low Accuracy + High Precision (Tight cluster off-center)
Low Accuracy + Low Precision (Wide random spread)
diagrams.purpose: Distinguishing between accuracy and precision concepts

diagrams.title: Calibration Drift Over Time
diagrams.description: Graph showing how measurements drift from true value over time without recalibration
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing why periodic calibration is necessary

diagrams.title: Calibration Traceability Chain
diagrams.description: Hierarchy showing how site measurements trace back to national standards
